metadata.name: Manage Parking for a Major Event

description: A major concert is scheduled. An operator must update dynamic parking signs to guide attendees to available lots.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve real-time occupancy data for all parking garages near the 'City Arena'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets a list of garages and their current fill percentages.

nodes.task_description: Identify that 'Garage C' is full and 'Garage D' has ample space.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly assesses the parking situation.

nodes.task_description: Update the dynamic message signs on the main approach roads to direct traffic towards 'Garage D'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the text on the digital signs.
